title: lagenandra ovata
intro: Lagenandra ovata, also known as the ovate lagenandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagenandra ovata include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lagenandra ovata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, and it can also be used as a powder or supplement in modern herbal preparations.
